name: Can I file a workers comp claim if it happened on my lunch break in Ogden?
description: Usually no—Utah workers' comp excludes lunch breaks and commutes.[1]

mainEntity.name: Can I file a workers comp claim if it happened on my lunch break in Ogden?

acceptedAnswer.text: Usually no—Utah workers' comp excludes lunch breaks and commutes.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description: No, injuries during lunch breaks or off-duty time like commutes are typically not covered under Utah workers' comp.[1] The system covers injuries only while performing required job duties or work errands.[1] Key factors: Coverage for traumatic injuries like slips or occupational illnesses like asbestos exposure, but not personal time; no-fault system means no proving employer fault.[1][2] Practical guidance: Report anyway if arguable, but expect denial; if third party caused it, consider civil suit separately.[3] A local attorney can review specifics for exceptions.
